title: My Kid’s Don’t Want to Work For Me | #shorts
full_text: This is going to sound so bad because of how we perceive it, but it almost does feel like I'm working a corporate job in some in some ways. Not the same corporate that we're talking about when we talk to dad's Wall Street job, but corporate in the way that I'm working under a boss and I'm looking to impress all the people around me to get a promotion. It really does feel like that a lot of the time. And that's >> and does not look like you're going to get the promotion. >> Yeah, Dad. >> What? I don't even know why that got a laugh. Dad is the sleeper comedian. I will die on the hill that he is the sleeper comedian. >> I feel like Brij feels that way because Zoya has a very competitive streak in her and the two of them are competing or something because I'm not making doing anything to make you feel that way. What? How?
